sections.name: Officium
lines: St. Francis de Sales, Bishop, Confessor, and Doctor of the Church

sections.name: Oratio
lines: O God, Who for the salvation of souls willed that blessed Francis, Your Confessor and Bishop, should become all things to all men, mercifully grant that we, inspired by the sweetness of Your love, guided by his teachings, and aided by his merits, may attain the joys of everlasting life.
